file_contents.prompts\\invoice_dashboard_react.prompt:
% You are an expert React engineer.
% Create an <InvoiceDashboard /> main dashboard component.

<include>context/frontend_preamble.prompt</include>

<extraction_reviewer_example>
<include>examples/extraction_reviewer_example.jsx</include>
</extraction_reviewer_example>

% Requirements
1. Fetch GET /api/invoices on mount; show loading skeleton
2. Table: invoice_number, vendor_name, invoice_date, total, status badge, actions
3. Status values: pending | extracted | reviewed | exported — color-coded badges
4. Row actions: View (open ExtractionReviewer), Export CSV, Delete
5. Bulk export: checkbox selection + Export Selected button
6. Summary cards at top: total invoices, total value, pending review count
7. Filter by status; sort by date or total

% What NOT in prompt
- Table sort implementation (grounding)
- Checkbox selection logic (grounding)
- Filter dropdown pattern (grounding + preamble)
